title: cotoneaster frigidus f. fructu-luteo
intro: Cotoneaster frigidus f. fructu-luteo is a cultivar of the Cotoneaster frigidus shrub, characterized by its unique yellow-fruited variety. This plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Chinese herbalism, where it is valued for its adaptogenic properties, which help the body adapt to stress and promote balance. The Cotoneaster frigidus f. fructu-luteo is believed to have various health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and immune-modulating effects, which may help protect against oxidative stress, inflammation, and infections. Herbal preparations of Cotoneaster frigidus f. fructu-luteo typically involve drying and processing the plant's leaves and fruits, which can then be made into teas, tinctures, or capsules for consumption.
